examples: Instead of tragedy, we got melodrama.
It is the melodious drama of ancient Greek theater, the term "melodious drama" being shortened eventually to "melodrama" because operas frequently are melodramatic, not to say unrealistic.
The action slips from comedy to melodrama and finally to tragedy.
Takal coaxes melodrama from first-person naturalism and smartly blends the allure of genre with do-it-yourself intimacy.
Real-world political melodrama, with obvious good and bad guys, but intelligent and well acted.
